channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: Major study finds voters have statistically zero influence on Congress. In case you’re curious why t...
item.description: Major study finds voters have statistically zero influence on Congress. In case you’re curious why the 80% issues don’t pass, from crime to open borders to secure elections.

item.title: @elonmusk: Nick Shirley: "The most powerful people in the world use X… The producers are on X… The people that ...
item.description: Nick Shirley: "The most powerful people in the world use X… The producers are on X… The people that are making changes in the world - they are on X."

item.title: @elonmusk: Everyone should hear this at least once. This is the best explanation of Western civilisation you’ll...
item.description: Everyone should hear this at least once. This is the best explanation of Western civilisation you’ll ever hear:

item.title: @elonmusk: Is Composer 2.5 really that good at coding? Anyone tried it yet?
item.description: Is Composer 2.5 really that good at coding? Anyone tried it yet?

item.title: @elonmusk: The amazing@NICKIMINAJshows up at SpaceX and thanks Elon for all he does for humanity right before l...
item.description: The amazing@NICKIMINAJshows up at SpaceX and thanks Elon for all he does for humanity right before launch❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: Crazy how Starbase is starting to sound normal now 🚀 Are we witnessing the beginning of an actual sp...
item.description: Crazy how Starbase is starting to sound normal now 🚀 Are we witnessing the beginning of an actual space city?

item.title: @elonmusk: CNBC: "When you look at the SpaceX prospectus, what do you see in it that sounds fantastical… but yo...
item.description: CNBC: "When you look at the SpaceX prospectus, what do you see in it that sounds fantastical… but you might think is real based on what you've seen accomplished at this point?"xcancel.com/ElonClipsX/status/2057…Walter Isaacson: "I think what's fantastical is this notion of building data centers in the near term in low-Earth orbit or on the moon. But it makes a lot of sense… Elon has been able to make the impossible merely the slightly late."

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX now launches more rockets than every other country combined. This has never happened before i...
item.description: SpaceX now launches more rockets than every other country combined. This has never happened before in the history of spaceflight.

item.title: @elonmusk: Nicki Minaj template dropped… so I became the baddie. 🔥🚀@Grok@Imagine
item.description: Nicki Minaj template dropped… so I became the baddie. 🔥🚀@Grok@Imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: America is unironically the greatest civilization to ever exist. On every axis. And it’s worth celeb...
item.description: America is unironically the greatest civilization to ever exist. On every axis. And it’s worth celebrating with all the zeal and love of this old Coca Cola commercial 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is actively hiring world-class engineers/physicists for SpaceXAI, even if you have zero prior...
item.description: SpaceX is actively hiring world-class engineers/physicists for SpaceXAI, even if you have zero prior experience in AI. Smart humans figure it out fast. Please send an email with ~3 bullet points demonstrating evidence of exceptional ability to ai_eng@spacex.com.
